sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65510" key="megalofeggh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-φεγγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n65510.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ζαφλεγέες</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
